title: croton patrum
intro: Croton patrum, also known as the Croton family, is a genus of flowering plants in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Croton patrum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Croton patrum include decoctions, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
